Package org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise

Class ListViewChartInstance

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.SObject
org.solenopsis.soap.enterprise.ListViewChartInstance
public class ListViewChartInstance extends SObject

Java class for ListViewChartInstance complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="ListViewChartInstance">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}sObject">
       <sequence>
         <element name="AggregateField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="AggregateType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ChartType" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DataQuery" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DataQueryWithoutUserFilters" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="DeveloperName" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ExternalId" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="GroupingField" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsDeletable" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsEditable" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="IsLastViewed" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="Label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ListViewChart" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ListViewChart" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ListViewChartId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ListViewContext" type="{urn:sobject.enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ListView" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="ListViewContextId" type="{urn:enterprise.soap.sforce.com}ID" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="SourceEntity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>
